title: Vāniyambādi heat wave
lead: Vāniyambādi is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.26. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing a significant threat to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Vāniyambādi has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The city's temperature is expected to remain high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.4 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) value is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 70%, and the wind speed is 4.1 km/h, which may exacerbate the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Vāniyambādi.
